explanation: Dùng liên từ 'Because' đứng đầu câu chỉ nguyên nhân ('we have a long holiday'), thay thế cho liên từ 'so' ở giữa câu.
options: Because of we have a long holiday, we are going to Vung Tau.
Because having a long holiday, we are going to Vung Tau.
Because we have a long holiday, we are going to Vung Tau.
Because we are going to Vung Tau, we have a long holiday.
question: We have a long holiday, so we are going to Vung Tau. (Rewrite using 'Because')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc câu ước ở hiện tại (wish + S + V-quá khứ đơn) diễn tả một mong muốn trái ngược với thực tế ở hiện tại.
options: I wish I had had enough money to help them.
I wish I had enough money to help them.
I wish I don't have enough money to help them.
I wish I have enough money to help them.
question: It’s a pity! I don’t have enough money to help them. (Rewrite using 'I wish')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Câu điều kiện loại 1 (If + S + V-hiện tại đơn, S + will + V) diễn tả một giả định có thể xảy ra ở hiện tại hoặc tương lai.
options: If you go to bed early, you will feel tired tomorrow.
If you don't go to bed early, you wouldn't feel tired tomorrow.
If you didn't go to bed early, you will feel tired tomorrow.
If you don't go to bed early, you will feel tired tomorrow.
question: You should go to bed early or you will feel tired tomorrow. (Rewrite using 'If you')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Khi tường thuật câu hỏi có từ để hỏi (Wh-), ta không mượn trợ động từ, giữ nguyên trật tự câu khẳng định và lùi thì (hiện tại đơn chuyển thành quá khứ đơn).
options: She asked me when my final exam started.
She asked me when did my final exam start.
She asked me when does my final exam start.
She asked me when my final exam starts.
question: She asked me, “When does your final exam start?” (Rewrite using 'She asked')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc câu ước trái với quá khứ diễn tả sự tiếc nuối: S + wish + S + had + V3/ed.
options: I wish you told me about the party.
I wish you would tell me about the party.
I wish you had told me about the party.
I wish you didn't tell me about the party.
question: What a pity you didn't tell me about the party. (Rewrite using 'I wish')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc câu ước trái với hiện tại: S + wish + S + V2/ed.
options: I wish I didn't know how to play the piano.
I wish I knew how to play the piano.
I wish I know how to play the piano.
I wish I had known how to play the piano.
question: I am sorry I don't know how to play the piano. (Rewrite using 'I wish')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Câu ước ở hiện tại, động từ to-be luôn được chia là 'were' (hoặc weren't) cho tất cả các ngôi.
options: I wish it hadn't rained heavily now.
I wish it weren't raining heavily now.
I wish it wouldn't rain heavily now.
I wish it isn't raining heavily now.
question: It's a shame that it is raining heavily now. (Rewrite using 'I wish')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Unless = If... not (Trừ khi). Ta giữ nguyên vế sau, bỏ chữ 'or' và đổi vế mệnh lệnh phía trước thành khẳng định (Unless you work = If you don't work).
options: Unless you worked harder, you wouldn't pass the final exam.
Unless you don't work harder, you won't pass the final exam.
Unless you work harder, you won't pass the final exam.
Unless you work harder, you will pass the final exam.
question: Work harder, or you won't pass the final exam. (Rewrite using 'Unless')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Tình huống ở hiện tại -> Dùng câu điều kiện loại 2 (trái với hiện tại). Nhớ lùi thì và đổi thể (khẳng định <-> phủ định).
options: If he has a car, he can drive to work.
If he didn't have a car, he couldn't drive to work.
If he had had a car, he could have driven to work.
If he had a car, he could drive to work.
question: He doesn't have a car, so he can't drive to work. (Rewrite using 'If')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Tình huống ở quá khứ -> Dùng câu điều kiện loại 3 (trái với quá khứ): If + S + had PII, S + would have PII.
options: If she hasn't been careless, she won't make a lot of mistakes.
If she hadn't been careless, she wouldn't have made a lot of mistakes.
If she weren't careless, she wouldn't make a lot of mistakes.
If she hadn't been careless, she would have made a lot of mistakes.
question: She was careless, so she made a lot of mistakes. (Rewrite using 'If')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc: Câu mệnh lệnh + or + mệnh đề tương lai -> Đổi thành câu điều kiện loại 1 (If you don't..., S + will...).
options: If you didn't keep quiet, the teacher would punish you.
If you don't keep quiet, the teacher will punish you.
If you keep quiet, the teacher will punish you.
If you won't keep quiet, the teacher punishes you.
question: Keep quiet or the teacher will punish you. (Rewrite using 'If')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Tường thuật lời đề nghị: suggest + V-ing, đồng thời phải lùi trạng từ chỉ thời gian (this -> that).
options: Mary suggested that we went to the beach this weekend.
Mary suggested to go to the beach this weekend.
Mary suggested going to the beach this weekend.
Mary suggested going to the beach that weekend.
question: “Why don't we go to the beach this weekend?” said Mary. (Rewrite using 'Mary suggested')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc xin lỗi: apologize to somebody for V-ing.
options: He apologized to me for to break my favorite vase.
He apologized to me for breaking my favorite vase.
He apologized me for breaking my favorite vase.
He apologized to me to break my favorite vase.
question: “I'm sorry I broke your favorite vase,” he said to me. (Rewrite using 'He apologized')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc nhắc nhở ai làm gì: remind somebody to do something.
options: She reminded him turning off the lights.
She reminded him to turn off the lights.
She reminded him not to turn off the lights.
She reminded him not forget to turn off the lights.
question: “Don't forget to turn off the lights,” she told him. (Rewrite using 'She reminded')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Tường thuật câu hỏi Yes/No: mượn if/whether, lùi thì (quá khứ đơn -> quá khứ hoàn thành), đổi trạng từ thời gian (yesterday -> the day before).
options: The boss asked me if I finished the report yesterday.
The boss asked me if I had finished the report yesterday.
The boss asked me if I had finished the report the day before.
The boss asked me whether did I finish the report the day before.
question: “Did you finish the report yesterday?” the boss asked me. (Rewrite using 'The boss asked')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc hứa hẹn: promise to do something, nhớ đổi đại từ sở hữu (your -> her) và trạng từ thời gian (tomorrow -> the following day).
options: He promised helping her with her homework tomorrow.
He promised to help her with her homework tomorrow.
He promised to help her with her homework the following day.
He promised he will help her with her homework the following day.
question: “I will help you with your homework tomorrow,” he said to her. (Rewrite using 'He promised')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc buộc tội: accuse somebody of V-ing.
options: The boy accused his friend to steal his bicycle.
The boy accused his friend for stealing his bicycle.
The boy accused his friend of stealing his bicycle.
The boy accused his friend on stealing his bicycle.
question: “You stole my bicycle!” the boy said to his friend. (Rewrite using 'The boy accused')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc nhượng bộ: Despite + Cụm danh từ/V-ing (lưu ý không dùng 'Despite of' hay 'Despite + mệnh đề').
options: Despite the weather was bad, we went on a picnic.
Despite the bad weather, but we went on a picnic.
Despite the bad weather, we went on a picnic.
Despite of the bad weather, we went on a picnic.
question: Although the weather was bad, we went on a picnic. (Rewrite using 'Despite')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc: Even though + mệnh đề (S + V). Trong tiếng Anh, khi đã dùng Although/Even though thì không dùng 'but' ở mệnh đề sau.
options: Even though he is old, he runs five kilometers every morning.
Even though his old age, he runs five kilometers every morning.
Even though he is old, but he runs five kilometers every morning.
Even though being old, he runs five kilometers every morning.
question: In spite of his old age, he runs five kilometers every morning. (Rewrite using 'Even though')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Nếu hai mệnh đề cùng chủ ngữ, ta có thể rút gọn thành: Despite + V-ing.
options: Despite her tired, she finished the project on time.
Despite she was very tired, she finished the project on time.
Despite being very tired, but she finished the project on time.
Despite being very tired, she finished the project on time.
question: Although she was very tired, she finished the project on time. (Rewrite using 'Despite')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Đổi cụm danh từ (the heavy rain) thành mệnh đề tương đương (it rained heavily) sau liên từ Because.
options: Because it rains heavy, we couldn't go out.
Because the rain was heavily, we couldn't go out.
Because it rained heavily, we couldn't go out.
Because it raining heavily, we couldn't go out.
question: Because of the heavy rain, we couldn't go out. (Rewrite using 'Because')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc quá... đến nỗi mà: S + V + such + (a/an) + adj + Noun + that + S + V.
options: It was such a test difficult that none of us could do it.
It was such difficult a test that none of us could do it.
It was such a difficult test that none of us could do it.
It was such difficult test that none of us could do it.
question: The test was so difficult that none of us could do it. (Rewrite using 'It was such')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc so...that. Lưu ý mệnh đề sau 'that' phải đầy đủ thành phần tân ngữ (drink it) và lùi thì phù hợp với vế trước (was -> couldn't).
options: The coffee was so hot that I couldn't drink it.
The coffee was so hot that I can't drink it.
The coffee was so hot for me to drink.
The coffee was so hot that I couldn't drink.
question: The coffee was too hot for me to drink. (Rewrite using 'The coffee was so')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Chuyển từ động từ thường (drove carelessly) sang to-be và cụm danh từ (was a careless driver).
options: He was such a carelessly driver that he caused an accident.
He was such careless a driver that he caused an accident.
He was such a careless driver that he caused an accident.
He was such a driver careless that he caused an accident.
question: He drove so carelessly that he caused an accident. (Rewrite using 'He was such')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Câu bị động với động từ tường thuật: S2 + be + said + to V (khi cả 2 hành động cùng ở hiện tại).
options: He is said that to be the best doctor in town.
He is said being the best doctor in town.
He is said to have been the best doctor in town.
He is said to be the best doctor in town.
question: People say that he is the best doctor in town. (Rewrite using 'He is said')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc bị động thì hiện tại hoàn thành: S + have/has + been + V3/ed.
options: A new hospital was built near my house.
A new hospital have been built near my house.
A new hospital has built near my house.
A new hospital has been built near my house.
question: They have built a new hospital near my house. (Rewrite using 'A new hospital')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc bị động thì tương lai gần: S + am/is/are + going to be + V3/ed.
options: A new supermarket is going to build here.
A new supermarket is going to be built here.
A new supermarket are going to be built here.
A new supermarket will be built here.
question: They are going to build a new supermarket here. (Rewrite using 'A new supermarket')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Bị động của động từ khuyết thiếu/bán khuyết thiếu: need to be + V3/ed (với chủ ngữ 'This room' số ít nên 'needs' phải thêm s).
options: This room needs be cleaned immediately.
This room needs clean immediately.
This room need to be cleaned immediately.
This room needs to be cleaned immediately.
question: Someone needs to clean this room immediately. (Rewrite using 'This room')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Chuyển từ so sánh bằng phủ định (không ai bằng) sang so sánh nhất (the + adj-est).
options: Peter is taller boy in the class.
Peter is the most tall boy in the class.
Peter is the tallest boy in the class.
Peter is tallest boy in the class.
question: No one else in the class is as tall as Peter. (Rewrite using 'Peter is')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc kinh điển: Câu so sánh nhất thường đi kèm với mệnh đề ở thì hiện tại hoàn thành (This is the most... I have ever...).
options: This is the more beautiful house I have ever seen.
This is the beautifulest house I have ever seen.
This is the most beautiful house I have ever seen.
This is such a beautiful house I have ever seen.
question: I have never seen such a beautiful house before. (Rewrite using 'This is')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Chuyển từ so sánh hơn (A hơn B) sang so sánh không bằng (B không bằng A): S + be + not as/so + adj + as + O.
options: English is not as difficult to learn as Russian.
English is difficult to learn as Russian.
English is more difficult to learn than Russian.
English is not difficult to learn as Russian.
question: Russian is more difficult to learn than English. (Rewrite using 'English is')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc so sánh kép (Càng... càng...): The + so sánh hơn + S + V, The + so sánh hơn + S + V.
options: The older he gets, the more experienced he becomes.
The older he gets, the more experience he becomes.
The older he gets, more experienced he becomes.
The older he gets, the most experienced he becomes.
question: As he gets older, he becomes more experienced. (Rewrite using 'The older')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Chuyển thì hiện tại hoàn thành phủ định sang thì quá khứ đơn: The last time S + V2/ed + was + khoảng thời gian + ago.
options: The last time I have met him was three years ago.
The last time I met him was three years ago.
The last time I met him is three years ago.
The last time I met him was for three years.
question: I haven't met him for three years. (Rewrite using 'The last time')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Chuyển từ quá khứ đơn (started + V-ing + in/ago) sang thì hiện tại hoàn thành tiếp diễn (has/have + been + V-ing + since/for).
options: He has been working in this factory in 2010.
He has been working in this factory since 2010.
He has worked in this factory from 2010.
He has started working in this factory since 2010.
question: He started working in this factory in 2010. (Rewrite using 'He has')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Câu hỏi bắt đầu trong quá khứ (When did you begin) chuyển sang câu hỏi kéo dài đến hiện tại (How long have you been V-ing).
options: How long did you begin studying French?
How long are you studying French?
How long have you been studying French?
How long have you studied French ago?
question: When did you begin studying French? (Rewrite using 'How long')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc: This is the first time S + have/has + V3/ed = S + have/has never + V3/ed + before.
options: I have never eat Sushi before.
I have never eaten Sushi before.
I have never eaten Sushi ago.
I have never eaten Sushi then.
question: This is the first time I have eaten Sushi. (Rewrite using 'I have never')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Dùng đại từ quan hệ 'who' thay cho chủ ngữ chỉ người 'He', đưa mệnh đề phụ lên đứng ngay sau danh từ nó bổ nghĩa ('The man').
options: The man which is standing over there is my uncle.
The man is standing over there who is my uncle.
The man who is standing over there is my uncle.
The man whom is standing over there is my uncle.
question: The man is standing over there. He is my uncle. (Rewrite using 'The man')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc tiêu tốn thời gian: It takes/took + sb + time + to V = S + spend/spent + time + V-ing.
options: We spent two hours clean the house.
We spent two hours cleaning the house.
We spent two hours for cleaning the house.
We spent two hours to clean the house.
question: It took us two hours to clean the house. (Rewrite using 'We spent')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Cấu trúc: find it + adj + to V = have difficulty + (in) + V-ing (gặp khó khăn trong việc gì).
options: I had difficulty understanding the foreign teacher.
I had difficulty to understand the foreign teacher.
I had difficult understanding the foreign teacher.
I had a difficulty understanding the foreign teacher.
question: I found it difficult to understand the foreign teacher. (Rewrite using 'I had')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.

explanation: Câu xin phép lịch sự: Would you mind if I + V(quá khứ đơn)? = Do you mind if I + V(hiện tại đơn)?
options: Do you mind if I opened the window?
Do you mind if I open the window?
Do you mind me open the window?
Do you mind if I opening the window?
question: Would you mind if I opened the window? (Rewrite using 'Do you mind')
instruction: Rewrite each of the following sentences in such a way that it means almost the same as the original sentence, beginning with the words given.
